items.name: Ecograder
items.description: Ecograder analyzes websites for environmental impact by evaluating performance, design, development practices, and hosting, offering insights and recommendations to improve digital sustainability. A badge is provided that can be added to the footer of websites.

items.name: Kastor
items.description: Kastor estimates the carbon emissions of a website and analyzes it according to eco design and accessibility guidelines.

items.name: GreenIT-Analysis
items.description: A browser extension for analyzing the websites for best practices.

items.name: Firefox Power Profiler
items.description: A tool for profiling the power consumption of websites in Firefox.

items.name: Safari Web Inspector
items.description: A tool for inspecting and profiling websites in Safari, including energy impact.
